ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project status */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the project (percentage) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client's company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the client was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task status */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task assignment */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task assignment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_projects" (
  "client_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-project relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the client-project relationship was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the client-project relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., document, image) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES project_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., project manager, client) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the template was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)
